## Summary
Describe the change in one short paragraph.

## Checklist
- [ ] I kept the core C99 and no-heap/no-global rules intact where applicable.
- [ ] I updated docs for any API, behavior, or recovery change.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` if the user-visible contract changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for the new behavior.
- [ ] I verified the relevant build presets and test suites.
- [ ] I did not weaken failure-injection, sanitizer, or protocol coverage.
- [ ] I did not add AI as an author or co-author.

Add any migration notes, backend limitations, or follow-up work.
